# Sikkim Game (sikkimgame.co.in)

> Sikkim Game is an independent, reader-supported guide hub for the real-money, round-based mobile game category players call "Sikkim Game" — covering sign-in, sign-up, APK installation, bonus and invite codes, withdrawals, and plain-English breakdowns of Wingo and Colour Prediction rounds. This site is not the game operator, is not affiliated with the Government of Sikkim, and never handles deposits, withdrawals, passwords or account data — every real account action happens on the official operator's own platform.

## Getting started
- [Sikkim Game Login](https://sikkimgame.co.in/login): How to sign in, common login errors, and fixes.
- [Sikkim Game Register](https://sikkimgame.co.in/register): Quick sign-up overview and requirements.
- [How to Register](https://sikkimgame.co.in/how-to-register): Full screen-by-screen registration walkthrough.
- [Download](https://sikkimgame.co.in/download): Where to get the Android APK or use the web version.
- [How to Download](https://sikkimgame.co.in/how-to-download): Full install walkthrough.
- [APK Guide](https://sikkimgame.co.in/apk-guide): Verifying an APK file is genuine before installing.

## Codes and rewards
- [Invite Code](https://sikkimgame.co.in/invite-code): What an invite code does and where to enter it.
- [Gift Code](https://sikkimgame.co.in/game-gift-code): How to redeem a gift/reward code.
- [Bonus](https://sikkimgame.co.in/bonus): Every bonus type explained (welcome, referral, gift, promotional).
- [Withdrawal](https://sikkimgame.co.in/withdrawal): How cashouts typically work and common delays.
- [Refer & Earn](https://sikkimgame.co.in/refer-earn): Sharing your own referral code to earn rewards.

## Game modes
- [Wingo](https://sikkimgame.co.in/wingo): Rules, bet types (number/colour/size), and round timers.
- [Colour Prediction](https://sikkimgame.co.in/colour-prediction): Rules, payouts, and common scam patterns.
- [Lottery Game](https://sikkimgame.co.in/lottery-game): How the Wingo/Colour Prediction "lottery-style" formats work.

## Safety and support
- [Responsible Gaming](https://sikkimgame.co.in/responsible-gaming): Limits, warning signs, self-exclusion.
- [Customer Care](https://sikkimgame.co.in/customer-care): Official in-app support channels.
- [Disclaimer](https://sikkimgame.co.in/disclaimer): Independence from the operator and the Government of Sikkim.
- [FAQ](https://sikkimgame.co.in/faq): Every common question grouped by topic.

## Company
- [About](https://sikkimgame.co.in/about): Who runs this site and why.
- [Contact](https://sikkimgame.co.in/contact-us): Reach the site owners for content corrections.
- [Privacy Policy](https://sikkimgame.co.in/privacy-policy)
- [Terms & Conditions](https://sikkimgame.co.in/terms-and-conditions)
